turns.assistantContent:
**Batch 1 complete. All 3 critical fixes verified.** Now dispatching **Batch 2** — systemic fixes (parent fields + Bundled Resources tables) across remaining skills.

Per the mandate: sequential dispatch for writes. Each hivemaker agent gets a bounded packet with 4-5 skills.
